name: cronjob
description: Scheduled prompts: recurring jobs ("every 30m", "daily 07:30") and one-shot wake-ups ("in 20m", "at 18:30") that run as the brain's own conversations with full owner powers. Admin-only management.

configSchema.label: Scheduler
configSchema.hint: Tick interval, retry behavior and the guard check timeout.

configSchema.label: Tick interval (ms)
configSchema.hint: How often due jobs are checked.

configSchema.label: Turn attempts
configSchema.hint: Total attempts for a recurring job's turn on a transient request-time failure — 1 means no retry, 2 (the default) means one retry.

configSchema.label: Retry backoff (ms)
configSchema.hint: Pause before a retry so the transient condition can clear.

configSchema.label: Check timeout (ms)
configSchema.hint: Timeout for a job's cheap guard `check` command.
